problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 1,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
